content_body:
Located next to Toccoa River Outfitters, Copper Fox Bookstore is an immersive literary lounge and satellite coffee bar for Mtn. Mama's in downtown Blue Ridge, offering a curated selection of books for all ages and interests. Discover a unique and weekly-changing collection in a cozy, inviting atmosphere. Perfect for book lovers seeking new reads and hidden gems while on your North Georgia getaway! 

Looking for a peaceful place to work remotely on your vacation? The upstairs loft is an exclusive and quiet co-working space!
title: Copper Fox Bookstore
